title: carex neopolycephala var. simplex
intro: Carex neopolycephala var. simplex, also known as the Japanese sedge, is a type of flowering plant in the sedge family (Cyperaceae). It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and promoting digestive health. Carex neopolycephala var. simplex can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, with the dried plant material often being used in traditional remedies.
